headline.purpose: Page titles and major section headers. One per view.

title.purpose: Card titles, dialog headers, sidebar section labels.

body.purpose: All prose, descriptions, form labels, list content. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Badges, chip labels, metadata. Uppercase only in table headers.

data.purpose: All numeric values, percentages, P&L, timestamps. tabular-nums required.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Raised cards and subtly lifted tiles.

motion.name: ease-default
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Ease-out-expo: quick settle, no overshoot.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Run Backtest, Save Strategy, Create.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #1975b3; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(10,10,10,0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1668a1; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #1975b3; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #eef0f2; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(10,10,10,0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #ebecf0; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #1975b3; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Navigation items, icon actions, and tertiary controls.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 12h18M12 3l9 9-9 9"/></svg> Settings</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #ebecf0; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #1975b3; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Flat Card
components.description: Default content container. Inline panels, form sections, content groups.
components.html:
Strategy Details
SMA 20 crossover on BTC/USDT daily
components.css: .ds-card-flat { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #eef0f2; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; color: #666666; }

components.name: Raised Card
components.description: Dashboard tiles and summary panels that read as above the page surface.
components.css: .ds-card-raised { background: #f3f4f6; border: 1px solid #eef0f2; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(10,10,10,0.05); color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-card-label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #666666; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-metric { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #0a0a0a; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Strategy names, settings, form fields.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-input { height: 36px; width: 100%; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid #eef0f2; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(10,10,10,0.05); transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #666666; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #eef0f2; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #1975b3; } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: #dc2828; } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true']:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #dc2828; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Semantic status labels. Backtest status, strategy health, usage tiers.
components.html: ActiveProfitableReviewError
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 1px 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-badge--default { background: #1975b3; color: #ffffff; } .ds-badge--success { background: #16a249; color: #ffffff; } .ds-badge--warning { background: #f59f0a; color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-badge--destructive { background: #dc2828; color: #ffffff; } .ds-badge--outline { background: transparent; color: #0a0a0a; border-color: #eef0f2; }

components.name: Canvas Block Node
components.description: Strategy canvas building block. The signature component — each category has a distinct semantic color. Never replicate these colors outside the canvas.
components.html:
SMA
Period20
components.css: .ds-node { position: relative; min-width: 160px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(60,131,246,0.3); border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(10,10,10,0.05); } .ds-node--indicator { border-color: rgba(60,131,246,0.3); } .ds-node--indicator .ds-node-header { background: #3c83f6; } .ds-node--input { border-color: rgba(146,52,234,0.3); } .ds-node--input .ds-node-header { background: #9234ea; } .ds-node--logic { border-color: rgba(219,119,6,0.3); } .ds-node--logic .ds-node-header { background: #db7706; } .ds-node--signal { border-color: rgba(33,196,93,0.3); } .ds-node--signal .ds-node-header { background: #21c45d; } .ds-node--risk { border-color: rgba(220,40,40,0.3); } .ds-node--risk .ds-node-header { background: #dc2828; } .ds-node-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 5px 5px 0 0; color: #ffffff; } .ds-node-icon { width: 14px; height: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-node-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-node-body { padding: 8px 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-node-field { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .ds-node-field-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #666666; } .ds-node-field-value { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-node-handle { position: absolute; top: 50%; width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #3c83f6; border: 2px solid #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); } .ds-node-handle--left { left: -5px; } .ds-node-handle--right { right: -5px; }

narrative.overview:
Blockbuilders is a tool that steps back so the strategy is what you see. Every design decision is filtered through a single question: does this element help the trader understand their strategy, or does it compete with it? The interface carries no decorative weight. Chrome recedes; data surfaces.

The system is cool, structured, and unambiguous. It uses a single blue accent against neutral grays, reserving color for one place that earns it: the canvas, where five semantic block categories speak in their own visual grammar. Outside the canvas, the interface is quiet. Inside the canvas, the structure of a strategy is immediately legible by color alone.

Both light and dark modes are first-class. Light for daytime focused sessions; dark for late-night review. The system follows the user's system preference by default. Neither mode defaults to drama.
keyCharacteristics: Single teal-blue accent; all other color is semantic or canvas-only
IBM Plex Sans + IBM Plex Mono: engineered without coldness, precise without intimidation
Gently curved surfaces (8px); never sharp, never pill-shaped
Three-stop elevation scale; flat surfaces dominate, shadows are structural
Dual-mode: light and dark, system-preference driven, both fully specified
The canvas block taxonomy is the only place five distinct hues coexist

rules.name: The Silent Surface Rule
rules.body: Background and surface-elevated share the same cool neutral family. Depth is earned by shadow and border, never by a competing hue.

rules.name: The Canvas Grammar Rule
rules.body: The five block category colors (violet, blue, amber, green, red) are used exclusively on canvas nodes. They never appear as accent colors, link colors, badges, or any UI chrome outside the canvas.

rules.name: The Mono Data Rule
rules.body: Every numeric value, percentage, P&L figure, date, and timestamp is rendered in IBM Plex Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. Displaying financial data in proportional type is prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow is a semantic claim — this element is above the page. Make that claim only when it's true.

dos: Do render all numeric values, percentages, and financial figures in IBM Plex Mono with tabular-nums.
Do use the five canvas block colors (violet, blue, amber, green, red) exclusively on canvas nodes.
Do apply shadows only on raised cards (shadow-sm), floating UI (shadow-md), and modal overlays (shadow-overlay).
Do use tinted soft backgrounds for inline alert banners rather than full-saturation state colors.
Do follow the system theme preference (light/dark) rather than forcing either mode.
Do ensure focus states are visible on all interactive elements for keyboard navigation.
donts: Don't use neon, high-chroma, or vibrant accent colors anywhere in the UI chrome. No glowing borders, no animated color pulses, no gradient overlays.
Don't use information density as a design value. Bloomberg-style triple-pane layouts and unpadded full-width data tables are prohibited.
Don't use decorative shadows. Shadows communicate layer position only.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored category or state stripe on cards, list items, or alerts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Use weight or size for emphasis.
Don't render any chart value, metric figure, or timestamp in IBM Plex Sans.
Don't apply block category colors to badges, buttons, navigation items, or any surface outside the strategy canvas.
